gate_manifest.scope: search-frontier decision gate; no seed enumeration is performed
gate_manifest.canonical_seed_order: 1-byte seeds first, then 2-byte, then 3-byte, then 4-byte, each bucket big-endian
rules: treat prefix-4 as steering evidence only
require prefix>=5 movement before exact-search escalation
require prefix>=6, exact hits, selected spans, or sub-1-GiB forecast before broad depth-4 execution
require selected exact spans after metadata before format promotion
keep paired shadow, binary, and high-entropy controls from inflating ordinary-corpus proof

summary.next_action: Design a materially new byte-to-seed mechanism or stronger reversible frontier generator; do not spend on broad raw depth search from the current prefix-only frontier.

gate_checks.requirement: best non-planted exact-hit forecast below 1 GiB
gate_checks.consequence: Do not broaden raw exact search while the best forecast remains hundreds of GiB per expected hit.

gate_checks.requirement: held-out/control rows reach prefix>=5 before exact-search escalation
gate_checks.consequence: Treat prefix-4 as transform-design telemetry, not compression evidence.

gate_checks.requirement: new ordinary held-out groups produce prefix>=5 movement while controls stay null
gate_checks.consequence: Keep replication corpora in the frontier artifact instead of staling the expensive corpus matrices.

gate_checks.requirement: profitable selected exact spans appear after metadata accounting
gate_checks.observed: 0 selected spans and 0 positive/exact promotion hits
gate_checks.consequence: Do not promote transform metadata or packed sidecar format work without selected exact spans.

gate_checks.requirement: depth-3 frontier finds prefix>=6, exact hits, or selected spans
gate_checks.observed: 0 prefix>=6 rows, 0 exact hits, 0 selected spans
gate_checks.consequence: Keep broad depth-3 and depth-4 work gated; prefix>=5 alone did not become compression.

gate_checks.requirement: pilot shard finds prefix>=6, exact hits, or selected spans before all shards
gate_checks.observed: 0 prefix>=6 rows, 0 exact hits, 0 selected spans
gate_checks.consequence: Do not run the remaining depth-4 shards from the current frontier.

gate_checks.requirement: full depth-4 exact probability is high enough to justify full execution
gate_checks.consequence: The current full-shard probability is too small to justify compute without a stronger frontier.
